defs: if it's plowing, ask the laborer (idiom); when managing a matter, consult the appropriate specialist

pinyin: geng1 dang1 wen4 nu2 , zhi1 dang1 fang3 bi4
defs: if it's plowing ask the laborer, if it's weaving ask the maid (idiom); when managing a matter, consult the appropriate specialist
"land to the tiller", post-Liberation land reform movement instigated by the CCP
fig. to work or study diligently
to be both a farmer and a scholar
to work the land and also undertake academic studies
